text: The laparoscopic camera positioned at the peri-umbilical port provides a view of the pelvic cavity, displaying the anatomical structures within this region.
The surgeon has opened the left-sided peritoneal attachments to the rectosigmoid colon, revealing the ureter beneath.
The surgical view reveals two ureters in the exposed pelvic area, visible after opening the left-sided peritoneal attachments to the rectosigmoid colon.
The patient then went on to have a successful low anterior resection.
